rulings.Case Title: CHARLES GILPIN et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel The Depositions Of Defendant The Goodyear Tire Rubber Company'S Person Most Knowledgeable And Custodian Of Records And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, March 1, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1, Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the depositions of defendant The Goodyear Tire and Rubber Co.¿s person most knowledgeable and custodian of records and request for production of documents and request for sanctions is continued on the court¿s own motion to March 6. = (503/TLJ)
